pandocultimateconverter: Name of this extension. Shown as the title of the special page.
pandocultimateconverter-desc: Short description of the extension, shown in the extension credits list.
pandocultimateconverter-summary: Short description of the extension, used in various places.
pandocultimateconverter-warning-page-nam: Warning shown when the user-entered article title is too short or too long. $1 is the minimum allowed character count, $2 is the maximum allowed character count.
Warning shown when the article title contains characters that are not allowed in page titles. $1 is a list of the invalid characters found.
pandocultimateconverter-warning-file-not: Warning shown when the user tries to submit the form without selecting a file.
pandocultimateconverter-history-comment: Edit summary appended to the page revision history when Pandoc converts a file into a wiki page.
pandocultimateconverter-conversion-compl: Edit summary used when the uploaded source file is automatically deleted after successful conversion.
pandocultimateconverter-special-upload-d: Introductory description shown at the top of the special page upload form.
pandocultimateconverter-special-upload-f: Label for the file-selection section of the upload form.
Label for the file input field.
pandocultimateconverter-special-source-t: Label for the source-type selector (File vs URL) dropdown.
pandocultimateconverter-special-url-labe: Label for the URL input field.
pandocultimateconverter-special-page-lab: Label for the target wiki page name input field.
pandocultimateconverter-special-page-pla: Placeholder text inside the target page name input field.
pandocultimateconverter-special-upload-t: Label for the section where the user enters the target wiki page name.
pandocultimateconverter-special-upload-b: Label text on the submit button of the upload/convert form.
pandocultimateconverter-loading: Text shown inside a loading overlay while a file is being uploaded and converted.
pandocultimateconverter-error-upload: Error message shown when a file upload fails for a generic reason. $1 is the error detail returned by the server.
pandocultimateconverter-error-filetype-b: Error message shown when the uploaded file type is not allowed. $1 is the file extension (e.g. 'docx'). $2 is the PHP variable prefix ('$wg') — do not translate it. The full PHP snippet '$2wgFileExtensions[] = "$1";' must remain syntactically correct.
pandocultimateconverter-error-uploaddisa: Error message shown when file uploads are disabled on the wiki. The PHP snippet '$wgEnableUploads = true;' is a code literal and must not be translated.
pandocultimateconverter-error-mustbelogg: Error message shown when an anonymous user tries to upload a file.
pandocultimateconverter-error-generic: Generic fallback error message when a file upload fails. $1 is the error detail returned by the server.
apierror-pandocultimateconverter-nosourc: API error shown when the caller omits both 'filename' and 'url' parameters.
apierror-pandocultimateconverter-multipl: API error shown when the caller supplies both 'filename' and 'url' parameters simultaneously.
apierror-pandocultimateconverter-invalid: API error shown when the provided URL uses a scheme other than http or https.
apierror-pandocultimateconverter-pageexi: API error shown when the target page already exists and forceoverwrite was not set.
apierror-pandocultimateconverter-convers: API error shown when Pandoc fails to convert the source. $1 is the error message from Pandoc.
apihelp-pandocconvert-summary: One-line summary of the pandocconvert API module, shown in API help pages.
apihelp-pandocconvert-param-pagename: Description of the 'pagename' parameter shown in API help.
apihelp-pandocconvert-param-filename: Description of the 'filename' parameter shown in API help.
apihelp-pandocconvert-param-url: Description of the 'url' parameter shown in API help.
apihelp-pandocconvert-param-forceoverwri: Description of the 'forceoverwrite' parameter shown in API help.
apihelp-pandocconvert-example-file: Label for the file-based example in the API help page.
apihelp-pandocconvert-example-url: Label for the URL-based example in the API help page.
